title: glandora gastonii
intro: Glandora gastonii, also known as Rock Jasmine or Rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Glandora gastonii include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce stress, and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or teas, as well as the use of its flowers and leaves in topical applications for skin issues.
